title: homalolepis rigida
intro: Homalolepis rigida, also known as the Mexican tea or yerba de la reina, is a plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Homalolepis rigida is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
